# Everlane Realty

> Everlane Realty: a St. Petersburg, FL brokerage. Broker: Serge Osaulenko, License #BK3384892.
> This site serves static, server-rendered HTML on every page (no client-side rendering), with computed market data refreshed by the brokerage's own automation.


## Pages
- [Ask Lane](https://everlanerealty.com/ask/): Ask a plain-English question about St. Petersburg real estate — flood zones, neighborhoods, taxes, short-term-rental rules, the buying and selling process — answered only from Everlane&#39;s own sourced knowledge base, and backed by a real broker.
- [Serge Osaulenko, Licensed Real Estate Broker](https://everlanerealty.com/team/serge-osaulenko/): Serge Osaulenko — Licensed Real Estate Broker at Everlane Realty, St. Petersburg FL. License #BK3384892. English &amp; Russian.
- [Buyer &amp; Seller Guides](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/): Plain-language guides to buying and selling in St. Petersburg — flood zones and insurance, neighborhoods, the real process and costs — written by a local broker.
- [About Everlane Realty](https://everlanerealty.com/about/): What Everlane Realty is and why it exists — an independent, broker-owned St. Petersburg brokerage built around close reading, honest advice, and a self-running local-market knowledge base.
- [Privacy Policy](https://everlanerealty.com/privacy/): How Everlane Realty collects, uses, and protects your information.
- [Terms of Use](https://everlanerealty.com/terms/): Terms of use for everlanerealty.com.
- [Accessibility Statement](https://everlanerealty.com/accessibility/): Everlane Realty&#39;s accessibility commitment — WCAG 2.1 AA target across the site.
- [DMCA Notice](https://everlanerealty.com/dmca/): DMCA designated-agent information for everlanerealty.com.
- [Tell me your situation](https://everlanerealty.com/contact/): A few quick questions and I&#39;ll come back with a clear, honest plan — buying, selling, or figuring out your options.
- [What&#39;s Your Home Worth?](https://everlanerealty.com/valuation/): Get a real, current read on your St. Petersburg home&#39;s value — a broker&#39;s market opinion (CMA), not an automated estimate. No obligation, no pressure.
- [Flood zones &amp;amp; insurance in St. Pete](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/flood-zones-insurance-st-pete/): What flood zones actually mean for buying in St. Petersburg — FEMA maps, what insurance really costs after the 2024 storms, the Citizens mandate, and how to read a property&amp;#39;s real flood story. By a local broker.
- [The best neighborhoods in St. Petersburg](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/best-neighborhoods-st-petersburg/): An honest neighborhood guide to St. Petersburg from a local broker: historic districts, waterfront streets, walkable blocks, and the flood story of each — organized by what you&amp;#39;re actually optimizing for.
- [Moving to St. Petersburg](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/moving-to-st-petersburg/): The relocation guide — geography, weather reality, cost mechanics, and how the city actually lays out — from a broker who moved here himself.
- [Buying in St. Pete: the real process and costs](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/buying-in-st-pete-process-costs/): The buying process as it actually runs in Pinellas County — every step, every dollar, first-hand from the broker&amp;#39;s side of the table.
- [Selling in St. Pete: pricing honestly](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/selling-in-st-pete-pricing-honestly/): CMA vs. appraisal vs. the instant online estimate — how pricing actually works in St. Pete, why the portals miss here, and what an honest range looks like.
- [Short-term rentals in Pinellas: where Airbnb is actually allowed](https://everlanerealty.com/guides/short-term-rentals-pinellas/): The municipality-by-municipality short-term-rental map of Pinellas County — what&amp;#39;s actually legal where, cited to each city&amp;#39;s current ordinance.
- [St. Petersburg Neighborhoods](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/): Real neighborhood guides for St. Petersburg — narrative from a local broker, live market stats, and the flood story per neighborhood. No auto-generated filler.
- [Search St. Petersburg &amp; Tampa Bay Listings](https://everlanerealty.com/search/): Every active MLS listing across St. Petersburg and Tampa Bay — search by map, city, or ZIP with a local broker who actually picks up the phone.
- [How This Site Runs](https://everlanerealty.com/ai/): The colophon: how Everlane Realty&#39;s site runs itself — the data pipeline, what the automation does, what the broker decides, and the honest guardrails.
- [Old Northeast](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/old-northeast/): Old Northeast, St. Petersburg — brick streets, hex-block sidewalks, and one of Florida&amp;#39;s largest National Register historic districts. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Snell Isle](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/snell-isle/): Snell Isle, St. Petersburg — C. Perry Snell&amp;#39;s 1920s Mediterranean estate island on the open bay, with the Vinoy golf course at its core and a flood story that reads lot by lot. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Downtown / EDGE District](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/downtown-edge-district/): Downtown St. Pete and the EDGE District — condo towers and townhomes over the waterfront parks, the Pier, and Central Avenue, and block for block the city&amp;#39;s newest construction. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Historic Kenwood](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/historic-kenwood/): Historic Kenwood, St. Petersburg — the city&amp;#39;s bungalow district west of downtown, a National Register historic district since 2003, and an inland flood posture read block by block. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Shore Acres](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/shore-acres/): Shore Acres, St. Petersburg — waterfront value and the city&amp;#39;s most honest flood story: the canals, Helene, and why the elevation certificate decides the deal. With live market stats.
- [Crescent Lake](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/crescent-lake/): Crescent Lake, St. Petersburg — a 1920s grid around its namesake lake and park, a mile north of downtown: historic in character, without the historic-district rulebook. With live market stats.
- [Gulfport](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/gulfport/): Gulfport isn&amp;#39;t a St. Pete neighborhood — it&amp;#39;s a separate city on Boca Ciega Bay, with an arts-village waterfront main street and its own rulebook. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Pinellas Point](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/pinellas-point/): Pinellas Point, St. Petersburg — the city&amp;#39;s southern tip on Tampa Bay: mid-century block homes, the historic Pink Streets, a Tocobaga temple mound, and an honest read on flood and value. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [Tierra Verde](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/tierra-verde/): Tierra Verde, Florida — an unincorporated island at the mouth of Tampa Bay: deep-water canals, the Pinellas Bayway, and Fort De Soto Park next door. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [St. Pete Beach](https://everlanerealty.com/neighborhoods/st-pete-beach/): St. Pete Beach — its own city on Long Key, a Gulf barrier island: the beach, the Don CeSar, its own rules, and a coastal-hazard flood story read per-address. The full chapter, with live market stats.
- [St. Petersburg Market Data](https://everlanerealty.com/market/): St. Petersburg housing market data — median price, days on market, inventory — from Everlane&#39;s own copy of the MLS data, with a monthly broker read. Real data or nothing, never estimates.
- [Buy &amp; Sell St. Pete Like a Local | Everlane Realty](https://everlanerealty.com/): Search every home for sale in St. Petersburg &amp; Tampa Bay, get an honest broker-prepared home valuation, and book a consult — with Serge Osaulenko at Everlane Realty.
